name: polly-retry
title: Polly Retry Policy (.NET)
description: Configures an HTTP retry policy with exponential backoff using Polly.
bestPractices: Use exponential backoff to avoid overwhelming a failing service
Combine retry with circuit breaker for comprehensive resilience
Log each retry attempt for observability
pitfalls: Avoid retrying non-transient errors such as 400 Bad Request or 401 Unauthorized
Do not use a fixed delay in high-concurrency scenarios — exponential backoff with jitter is preferred
